response: This app is amazing! It has completely changed how I manage my daily tasks and I love the clean interface.
Crashes frequently on my device. Very frustrating experience.
Good concept but the user interface needs significant improvement. Too many steps to complete simple actions which makes it inefficient for daily use.
Best productivity app I've ever used! The notifications are helpful and the sync works perfectly across all my devices.
Not worth the subscription price in my opinion.
The latest update broke several features I relied on daily. Please fix the calendar sync and notification bugs as soon as possible.
Simple and intuitive design. Does exactly what it promises without unnecessary complications.
I've been using this for three months now and it's become essential to my workflow. The team collaboration features are particularly useful for our remote team meetings.
Load times are extremely slow and the search function barely works. Needs major performance improvements before I can recommend it.
Love the dark mode! Finally an app that cares about accessibility and user preferences.
The onboarding tutorial was confusing and I still don't understand half the features. Could benefit from better documentation and clearer in-app guidance.
Perfect for students! Helps me keep track of assignments and deadlines effectively.
Too many ads interrupt the user experience constantly.
Great customer support team. They responded to my issue within hours and resolved everything quickly. The app itself works smoothly and has all the features I need.
Needs offline mode. I can't always rely on having internet connection.
The widget is broken on iOS and hasn't been fixed for weeks despite multiple reports. Otherwise the app is decent but this is a major issue.
Excellent value for money with tons of useful features.
I appreciate the frequent updates and new features, but sometimes I wish the team would focus more on stability rather than adding new things constantly.
Cannot export my data which is a dealbreaker for me. I need to be able to backup and transfer my information to other platforms easily.
Five stars! This app does everything I need and more. The customization options are incredible and the performance is smooth on my older phone.
Battery drain is terrible. App runs in background constantly.
The interface redesign in version two is much better than the original. Navigation is more intuitive and the new color scheme is easier on the eyes during long sessions.
Missing key features that competitors have had for years like tags and filters.
Works flawlessly. No complaints at all after six months of daily use.
Privacy concerns. Why does this app need access to my contacts and location when it's just a note-taking app? Seems unnecessary and suspicious.
